overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval coastal town. The character walks from a sunny riverside path through a dark stone underpass, emerges onto a beach, and continues along the waterfront before ascending stone stairs into the upper town.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy riverside path approaching stone aqueduct

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the grassy riverbank toward a large stone aqueduct bridge

entered.detail: large stone bridge with multiple arches spanning the river
cluster of historic buildings with red roofs atop a rocky hill
calm water reflecting the sky and surrounding structures
short wooden posts lining the edge of the path
green grassy terrain along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunny riverside path with grass underfoot. A massive stone aqueduct bridge dominates the view ahead, while a medieval town perches on a hill to the left. The scene is bright and open with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone tunnel beneath the aqueduct

events.description: enters the shadowy tunnel beneath the stone bridge, lighting drops to near darkness

agents.ego_description: Geralt enters the dark tunnel beneath the aqueduct, walking along wooden dock planks beside canal water

entered.detail: dark stone archway forming the tunnel entrance
weathered wooden planks forming the walkway over water
dark water channel running alongside the path
medieval half-timbered structure with dark wood beams
rough stone walls of the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a dark enclosed tunnel beneath the stone bridge. Geralt walks on wooden planks over canal water, passing timber-framed buildings on the right. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, with stone walls surrounding the path.

events.description: exits the dark tunnel into bright sunlight, causing a stark lighting transition
transitions from enclosed tunnel to open beach waterfront

agents.ego_description: Geralt emerges from the tunnel onto a bright beach, walking past wooden fishing structures toward the open sea

entered.detail: bright exit of the tunnel framing the sea beyond
expansive blue sea with gentle waves
small weathered wooden hut on the beach
hazy mountains visible across the water
vertical wooden posts in the water for docking boats

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the dark tunnel into bright sunlight on a sandy beach. The ocean stretches out to the right with distant mountains on the horizon. A small wooden fishing shack sits on the left as the character walks toward the water's edge.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the waterfront path beside wooden harbor buildings, passing scattered planks and fishing equipment

entered.detail: row of weathered wooden warehouses and workshops along the shore
sandy shore leading down to the water
tall ships with sails anchored in the harbor
low stone wall reinforcing the waterfront
loose wooden planks and debris along the walking path

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sunny waterfront, Geralt passes wooden harbor buildings on the left and sandy beach on the right. Sailing ships are visible in the distance across the calm water. The path is lined with scattered wooden planks and fishing gear.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to upper town gatehouse with stone stairs

events.description: begins ascending the stone stairs through the archway

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks past the waterfront buildings, turns toward a stone gatehouse, and begins climbing the wooden stairs into the upper town

entered.detail: imposing stone tower with arched entrance leading to upper town
large stone arch forming the gate entrance
grassy area with patches of dirt before the stairs
steep wooden staircase leading up through the archway

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the waterfront behind and approaches a imposing stone gatehouse with a large archway. He walks through an overgrown courtyard and begins ascending wooden stairs into the darker tunnel of the archway, transitioning from the bright exterior to the shadowed interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright riverside path through a dark underpass and across a sunny beach before ascending into a fortified town. It begins in an open, sunlit landscape where Geralt walks along a grassy path toward a massive stone aqueduct and a distant hillside town. The scene then shifts abruptly into a dim, atmospheric tunnel beneath the bridge, moving across wooden planks over canal water between stone walls and timber buildings. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the environment opens up into a bright sandy beach with a wooden fishing shack and a view of distant mountains across the ocean. The movement continues along the waterfront past harbor buildings and sailing ships before finally turning toward an imposing stone gatehouse, where the character ascends wooden stairs and disappears into the shadowed interior of a large archway.
